title: Digital Logic - Min Sum of Products Form - Theoretical/Not Answered

questions.question:
Let \( f=(\bar{w} + y)(\bar{x} +y)(w+\bar{x}+z)(\bar{w}+z)(\bar{x}+z) \)



GATE CSE 1997 | Question: 71
options: Express \( f \) as the minimal sum of products. Write only the answer.
If the output line is stuck at \( 0 \), for how many input combinations will the value of \( f \) be correct?
